description: Style noteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DetailsBlunt toed green sandal with thong style strapsHas an elasticated heel collar for easy slip-on stylingSoft light brown footbedHas a textured TPU outsole with butterfly grooves and a slightly upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
